CurrentIssues.ID: LongParameterList:ClangRunner.kt$ClangRunner$( counter: Int, input: FileWithHeaders, checks: String, context: ThirdPartyScanContext, clangPath: Path, tmpResultsDir: Path, stdoutLog: Path, stderrLog: Path, )
MaxLineLength:ClangLinter.kt$ClangLinter$"Ensure the clang-tidy archive is available for ${System.getProperty("os.name")}/${System.getProperty("os.arch")}"

ReturnCount:Main.kt$internal fun resolveThirdPartyEapExitCode( terminal: Terminal, buildDateStr: String = System.getProperty("qodana.build.date") ?: System.getenv("QODANA_BUILD_DATE") ?: "", isEap: Boolean = ( System.getProperty("qodana.is.eap") ?: System.getenv("QODANA_IS_EAP") ?: "false" ).toBooleanStrictOrNull() ?: false, checker: EapChecker = EapChecker(terminal), ): Int?
UseCheckOrError:ClangLinter.kt$ClangLinter$throw IllegalStateException("clang-tidy binary not found in mounted tools")
